class.name: AccessibilityServer
class.brief_description: A server interface for screen reader support.

method.name: create_element
method.description: Creates a new, empty accessibility element resource. [b]Note:[/b] An accessibility element is created and freed automatically for each [Node]. In general, this function should not be called manually.

method.name: create_sub_element
method.description: Creates a new, empty accessibility sub-element resource. Sub-elements can be used to provide accessibility information for objects which are not [Node]s, such as list items, table cells, or menu items. Sub-elements are freed automatically when the parent element is freed, or can be freed early using the [method free_element] method.

method.name: create_sub_text_edit_elements
method.description: Creates a new, empty accessibility sub-element from the shaped text buffer. Sub-elements are freed automatically when the parent element is freed, or can be freed early using the [method free_element] method. If [param is_last_line] is [code]true[/code], no trailing newline is appended to the text content. Set to [code]true[/code] for the last line in multi-line text fields and for single-line text fields.

method.name: element_get_meta
method.description: Returns the metadata of the accessibility element [param id].

method.name: element_set_meta
method.description: Sets the metadata of the accessibility element [param id] to [param meta].

method.name: free_element
method.description: Frees the accessibility element [param id] created by [method create_element], [method create_sub_element], or [method create_sub_text_edit_elements].

method.name: get_window_root
method.description: Returns the main accessibility element of the OS native window.

method.name: has_element
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param id] is a valid accessibility element.

method.name: is_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if screen reader is support by this implementation.

method.name: set_window_focused
method.description: Sets the window focused state for assistive apps. [b]Note:[/b] This method is implemented on Linux, macOS, and Windows. [b]Note:[/b] Advanced users only! [Window] objects call this method automatically.

method.name: set_window_rect
method.description: Sets window outer (with decorations) and inner (without decorations) bounds for assistive apps. [b]Note:[/b] This method is implemented on Linux, macOS, and Windows. [b]Note:[/b] Advanced users only! [Window] objects call this method automatically.

method.name: update_add_action
method.description: Adds a callback for the accessibility action (action which can be performed by using a special screen reader command or buttons on the Braille display), and marks this action as supported. The action callback receives one [Variant] argument, which value depends on action type.

method.name: update_add_child
method.description: Adds a child accessibility element. [b]Note:[/b] [Node] children and sub-elements are added to the child list automatically.

method.name: update_add_custom_action
method.description: Adds support for a custom accessibility action. [param action_id] is passed as an argument to the callback of [constant ACTION_CUSTOM] action.

method.name: update_add_related_controls
method.description: Adds an element that is controlled by this element.

method.name: update_add_related_described_by
method.description: Adds an element that describes this element.

method.name: update_add_related_details
method.description: Adds an element that details this element.

method.name: update_add_related_flow_to
method.description: Adds an element that this element flow into.

method.name: update_add_related_labeled_by
method.description: Adds an element that labels this element.

method.name: update_add_related_radio_group
method.description: Adds an element that is part of the same radio group. [b]Note:[/b] This method should be called on each element of the group, using all other elements as [param related_id].

method.name: update_set_active_descendant
method.description: Adds an element that is an active descendant of this element.

method.name: update_set_background_color
method.description: Sets element background color.

method.name: update_set_bounds
method.description: Sets element bounding box, relative to the node position.

method.name: update_set_braille_label
method.description: Sets element accessibility label for Braille display.

method.name: update_set_braille_role_description
method.description: Sets element accessibility role description for Braille display.

method.name: update_set_checked
method.description: Sets element checked state.

method.name: update_set_classname
method.description: Sets element class name.

method.name: update_set_color_value
method.description: Sets element color value.

method.name: update_set_description
method.description: Sets element accessibility description.

method.name: update_set_error_message
method.description: Sets an element which contains an error message for this element.

method.name: update_set_extra_info
method.description: Sets element accessibility extra information added to the element name.

method.name: update_set_flag
method.description: Sets element flag.

method.name: update_set_focus
method.description: Sets currently focused element.

method.name: update_set_foreground_color
method.description: Sets element foreground color.

method.name: update_set_in_page_link_target
method.description: Sets target element for the link.

method.name: update_set_language
method.description: Sets element text language.

method.name: update_set_list_item_count
method.description: Sets number of items in the list.

method.name: update_set_list_item_expanded
method.description: Sets list/tree item expanded status.

method.name: update_set_list_item_index
method.description: Sets the position of the element in the list.

method.name: update_set_list_item_level
method.description: Sets the hierarchical level of the element in the list.

method.name: update_set_list_item_selected
method.description: Sets list/tree item selected status.

method.name: update_set_list_orientation
method.description: Sets the orientation of the list elements.

method.name: update_set_live
method.description: Sets the priority of the live region updates.

method.name: update_set_member_of
method.description: Sets the element to be a member of the group.

method.name: update_set_name
method.description: Sets element accessibility name.

method.name: update_set_next_on_line
method.description: Sets next element on the line.

method.name: update_set_num_jump
method.description: Sets numeric value jump.

method.name: update_set_num_range
method.description: Sets numeric value range.

method.name: update_set_num_step
method.description: Sets numeric value step.

method.name: update_set_num_value
method.description: Sets numeric value.

method.name: update_set_placeholder
method.description: Sets placeholder text.

method.name: update_set_popup_type
method.description: Sets popup type for popup buttons.

method.name: update_set_previous_on_line
method.description: Sets previous element on the line.

method.name: update_set_role
method.description: Sets element accessibility role.

method.name: update_set_role_description
method.description: Sets element accessibility role description text.

method.name: update_set_scroll_x
method.description: Sets scroll bar x position.

method.name: update_set_scroll_x_range
method.description: Sets scroll bar x range.

method.name: update_set_scroll_y
method.description: Sets scroll bar y position.

method.name: update_set_scroll_y_range
method.description: Sets scroll bar y range.

method.name: update_set_shortcut
method.description: Sets the list of keyboard shortcuts used by element.

method.name: update_set_state_description
method.description: Sets human-readable description of the current checked state.

method.name: update_set_table_cell_position
method.description: Sets cell position in the table.

method.name: update_set_table_cell_span
method.description: Sets cell row/column span.

method.name: update_set_table_column_count
method.description: Sets number of columns in the table.

method.name: update_set_table_column_index
method.description: Sets position of the column.

method.name: update_set_table_row_count
method.description: Sets number of rows in the table.

method.name: update_set_table_row_index
method.description: Sets position of the row in the table.

method.name: update_set_text_align
method.description: Sets element text alignment.

method.name: update_set_text_decorations
method.description: Sets text underline/overline/strikethrough.

method.name: update_set_text_orientation
method.description: Sets text orientation.

method.name: update_set_text_selection
method.description: Sets text selection to the text field. [param text_start_id] and [param text_end_id] should be elements created by [method create_sub_text_edit_elements]. Character offsets are relative to the corresponding element.

method.name: update_set_tooltip
method.description: Sets tooltip text.

method.name: update_set_transform
method.description: Sets element 2D transform.

method.name: update_set_url
method.description: Sets link URL.

method.name: update_set_value
method.description: Sets element text value.

constants.constant: Container element. Elements with this role are used for internal structure and ignored by screen readers.
Popup menu check button item element.
Popup menu radio button item element.
Region/landmark element. Screen readers can navigate between regions using landmark navigation.
Unifor text run. Note: This role is used for internal text elements, and should not be assigned to nodes.
Element is hidden for accessibility tools.
Element content is not ready (e.g. loading).
Element allows touches to be passed through when a screen reader is in touch exploration mode.
Element is text field with selectable but read-only text.
Single click action, callback argument is not set.
Focus action, callback argument is not set.
Blur action, callback argument is not set.
Collapse action, callback argument is not set.
Expand action, callback argument is not set.
Decrement action, callback argument is not set.
Increment action, callback argument is not set.
Hide tooltip action, callback argument is not set.
Show tooltip action, callback argument is not set.

Set text selection action, callback argument is set to [Dictionary] with the following keys: - [code]"start_element"[/code] accessibility element of the selection start. - [code]"start_char"[/code] character offset relative to the accessibility element of the selection start. - [code]"end_element"[/code] accessibility element of the selection end. - [code]"end_char"[/code] character offset relative to the accessibility element of the selection end.
Replace text action, callback argument is set to [String] with the replacement text.
Scroll backward action, callback argument is not set.
Scroll down action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].
Scroll forward action, callback argument is not set.
Scroll left action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].
Scroll right action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].
Scroll up action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollUnit].
Scroll into view action, callback argument is set to [enum AccessibilityScrollHint].
Scroll to point action, callback argument is set to [Vector2] with the relative point coordinates.
Set scroll offset action, callback argument is set to [Vector2] with the scroll offset.
Set value action, callback argument is set to [String] or number with the new value.
Show context menu action, callback argument is not set.
Custom action, callback argument is set to the integer action ID.
Indicates that updates to the live region should not be presented.
Indicates that updates to the live region should be presented at the next opportunity (for example at the end of speaking the current sentence).
Indicates that updates to the live region have the highest priority and should be presented immediately.
The amount by which to scroll. A single item of a list, line of text.
The amount by which to scroll. A single page.
A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Top-left edge of the scroll container.
A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Bottom-right edge of the scroll container.
A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Top edge of the scroll container.
A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Bottom edge of the scroll container.
A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Left edge of the scroll container.
A preferred position for the node scrolled into view. Right edge of the scroll container.
